name: Pack Of 12 - Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Chicken And Carrot 50g
description: Spoil your cat with Spectrum Gusto Soup with Chicken and Carrot – a gourmet 50g cat treat packed with tender chicken, sweet carrot, and flavorful fish broth. Designed for all life stages, this snack can be served as a treat, reward, or topping to enhance regular meals. Its high moisture content ensures your cat stays hydrated while enjoying every bite. Key Features: Gourmet blend of real chicken and carrot. Moist and flavorful fish broth. High moisture content supports hydration. Convenient single-serve pouch (50g). Great for training, rewarding, or meal enhancement. Benefits: Supports healthy hydration. Encourages picky eaters to enjoy their meals. Easy and mess-free to serve. Low-fat, nutritious, and delicious.
